mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : MutEvalGradeDAO.listMutEvalGrade 설 명 : 평가 등급 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.GRDCD AS gradeCd , A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AS evalCd , A.QSTN_ID AS qstnCd , A.MTL_EVL_GRD_TTL AS gradeTitle , A.MTL_EVL_GRD_CTS AS gradeCts , A.MTL_EVL_MRK_GRDCD AS gradeScore , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM MTL_EVL_GRD AS A WHERE A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{evalCd} AND A.QSTN_ID IN
#{item}
